college_info.college_name: Navsari Agricultural University: Fees, Courses, Admissions 2025, Placement, Ranking

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Navsari Agricultural University ranks #35 under the category 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors'.

The GUJCET 2026 registrations are now closed for admission to the BE/BTech and BPharma courses. Also, the exam for the same will be conducted on Mar 29, 2026.

faqs.question: Can I take admission to MBA in Navsari Agricultural University without appearing in any entrance exam?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot get admission to Navsari Agricultural University (NAU) without appearing for an entrance exam. The University accepts Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR) All India Entrance Examination for Admission (AIEEA) exam. The entrance exam is one hour long and consists of 100 multiple-choice questions. The exam covers topics such as the basics of agriculture, verbal ability, logical reasoning, quantitative aptitude, data interpretation, and general knowledge. The University's Admission Committee decides the final qualifying cut-off for the entrance exam.

faqs.question: Is Navsari Agricultural University a good option?
faqs.answer: Yes, Navsari Agricultural University is a good option. The university was established in 2004. In addition, it depends on the specific needs and objectives that each student has. The institute ranks as one of the reputed agricultural institute centers of both education and research in India. More than 50 programs are offered for undergraduate, graduate, certificate, and Diploma degrees at NAU. Moreover, these colleges have professional staff and well-educated tutors. All the dedicated teachers afford the students an all-rounded education. Additionally, the University of NAU offers reasonable charges.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does Navsari Agricultural University accept for admission to M.Tech?
faqs.answer:
Navsari Agricultural University has M.E/M.Tech programme In 4 courses  and the fee for M.Tech is around 20,000 per year.
Coming to the process of admission you can get it through the ICAR AIEEA exam by clearing the cutoff rank of that particular course and there is an eligibility criterion which is the student must have 60 percent in his under graduation.

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at Navsari Agricultural University?
faqs.answer:
Navsari Agricultural University is an affordable option for students. Their fee structure is not so expensive. They offer many amazing courses at different levels of education. Authorities of universities reviewed the fee structure regularly. It may ensure that students don't have a burden for the fees. Here are some of their courses with fees 
B.Sc. in Agriculture: Starts at INR 1.2 Lacs (According to course)
M.Sc., M.B.A., and M.V.Sc.: INR 41,800
MBA in Agribusiness Management: INR 42,900

college_info.intro: NAU Navsari Agricultural University Gujarat extends a range of programs to the students. The flagship programme at the university are its BSc (Hons) Agriculture programme and MBA in Agribusiness Management these courses are taught at the affiliating colleges of the university for example: BSc (Hons) in Agriculture is offered by NM College of Agriculture, College of Agriculture Bharuch and College of Agriculture Waghai while MBA in Agribusiness Management is offered at the Aspee Agribusiness Management Institute.Navsari Agricultural University course admissions for BSc and MBA depends on entrance exams such as ICAR AIEEA for MBA and GUJCET/ICAR AIEEA for BSc. Students must have passed Undergraduate Degree with 60% aggregate for MBA and Class 10 and 12 with 50% aggregate for BSc. NAU's courses have been approved by the University Grants Commission (UGC).

placements.overview: According to the latest 2024 placement report released by NAU Navsari Agricultural University Gujarat a total of 422 students were eligible for placements with 77.01% of students being placed. The highest package stood at INR 6 LPA while the average package ranged between INR 5.87 LPA and INR 1.44 LPA for the different courses while the lowest package was INR 1.2 LPA. A total of 325 offers were made during the placement season with 117 PG, 160 UG and 48 Diploma students being placed. Top recruiters at Krushi University Navsari include AgroStar, Big Basket, Maahi Milk Producer Co. Ltd., Agrovikas Agritech Pvt. Ltd., Dudhsagar, Zydus, etc.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: NAU Navsari Agricultural University Gujarat extends over 20 Undergraduate, Postgraduate, PhD, Diploma and Certificate courses in streams such as Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, Agribusiness Management, Agricultural Engineering, Biotechnology, etc. Some of the courses include BSc, MSc, BTech, MTech, MBA, PhD, etc. in a range of specialisations such as MBA in Agribusiness, BTech in Agricultural Engineering, etc. The eligibility criteria depends on the specific course with UG and are offered under the different affiliating colleges of NAU Gujarat.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can get admission to Navsari Agricultural University with the ICAR AIEEA exam. The universities welcome students with this entrance exam test for some UG programs. Students also need to meet the minimum eligibility criteria. You need 45% marks in class 12, along with the ICAR AIEEA exam marks. Moreover, the final selection is based on the total scores of ICAR AIEEA score and class 12th scores. At the same time, performance in the counselling process also matters.
faqs.question: Does Navsari Agricultural University accept ICAR AIEEA score?

faqs.answer: A:    Navsari Agricultural University is one of the renowned universities of Gujarat, India. The university offers various programs. To get the admission in the university for Under Graduate programme the university take the admission with ICAR AIEEA exam score for which rank should be around 800 and it also checks the eligibility with the percentage in 12th The percentage should be 50% in 10+2 for admissionBest regards
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by Navsari Agricultural University for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can take direct admission into the Navsari Agricultural University. It also depends on the particular programme you are interested in and upon the qualification. You may enroll in NAU's Diploma programs in Agriculture, Horticulture, Veterinary Science, and Agricultural Engineering. The qualification required for this is 10+2 in the Science stream with a minimum of 45% marks. But, Bachelor's degree courses, M.Sc., MBA, and Ph.D. programs need entrance papers like ICAR-AIEEA, CAT, & GATE. Every programme has different requirements for the courses. The application process may vary depending on the program.
faqs.question: Can I join Navsari Agricultural University directly?

faqs.answer: A:    Navsari Agricultural University charges different amounts of fees based on the students’ category. Well, a particular UG course may cost differently than the other. UG Application Fees for General is Rs. 500, and for SC / ST, and OBC students is Rs. 250. The B.Sc. agriculture programme cost starts at INR 1.2 Lacs per year. Other programs like B.Tech. Food Technology or B.F.Sc. Fees for fisheries might be a little bit different.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Queen college of agriculture

review_content.Placements: Very good placement opportunity and good students and staff who are very polite in nature. The placement rate can be anywhere from 25% to 50% for students who opt for campus placements. Many students prefer to pursue higher studies instead, so that also affects the numbers. The college is a good option if you want to get into the agricultural field, especially with companies like IFFCO, KRIBHCO, Agrisco, Agriland, GSFC.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostels are well-managed and have decent infrastructure. You will get a room that you likely share with at least one other person, and each room is available with a study table and a chair. The campus itself is fully Wi-Fi enabled, so that's a plus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of College of Agriculture- Waghai, Navsari Agricultural University.

review_content.Placements: I am studying a BSc (Hons) Agriculture course, this course is for 4 years, and I am completing my degree in 2025. In our college 3 to 4 lakh packages can receive in the placement. Pesticides and Fertilizers companies HDFC banks other types of companies are given placement. It is a very beautiful course and my college staff is very helpful in teaching us and also guides us about future plans, entrepreneurs' ideas, etc. Around 10 students in placement in 2024
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, all department labs are there like the entomology lab, plant pathology lab, etc. In our college Wi-Fi facilities are very good and also in the hostel Wi-Fi is available. The classroom is very big and the air circulation is too good and all classes have a digital projector for PPT presentation. The library is very good having all types of books which help in the competitive exams and other general knowledge. Mess is attached to the hostel and food is good in the mess. Many sports are there like volleyball, kho kho, basketball, cricket, badminton, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure is good.

review_content.Placements: One of our seniors got placed in one firm for about salary package of 4 LPA to 5 LPA. Companies that visited were good. I appreciate the opportunity to interact with industry professionals and learn about companies. Overall, I'd rate college placement drive 4/5.
review_content.Infrastructure: I have had the pleasure of residing in our college hostel for past three years and I must say it is been an incredible experience. Hostel infrastructure is modern and well-maintained, with clean and spacious rooms, comfortable beds, and ample storage space.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It's a good college for study.

review_content.Placements: Yes our college has a placement facility. Last year the highest package was 360000 to 420000 which means 30 to 35 thousand per month. It has a good amount for newcomers and it was done by HDFC Bank. They came to our college university and selected the person for their job.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good and also has labs and a playground. There is also a library where you can get all the agriculture-related books and some non-agriculture-related books. The college also has free Wi-Fi, and the hostel rooms are good, clean, and have CCTV cameras.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Very satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: So in Waghai last year, a student got placement and the highest package is around 30000-35000 rs per month offered by HDFC Bank, so its 360000-420000 per annum. And for the new one, it's a good amount of package for B.Sc. Agriculture students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has very good infrastructure for study purposes. Our college has free Wi-Fi and also classrooms with projector screens and there are labs for experiments and practicals, and there is one library with all books available, which are related to agriculture and also some non-agriculture books. And hostel rooms are good and also have good quality beds and almira. Our college has one ground for sports and also a mess is available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I recommend students to take admission to this college.

review_content.Placements: Placements provided in our college are not good. It provides good placement opportunities. They organise placement training programs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Sports facilities are very good. All students can participate in sports.
review_content.Faculty: All the faculty members in our college regularly take classes. They are well-qualified, supportive, and knowledgeable about various current issues, agriculture-related topics, and research. They provide theoretical knowledge but not practical knowledge.

faqs.question: Can I join Navsari Agricultural University directly?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can take direct admission into the Navsari Agricultural University. It also depends on the particular programme you are interested in and upon the qualification. You may enroll in NAU's Diploma programs in Agriculture, Horticulture, Veterinary Science, and Agricultural Engineering. The qualification required for this is 10+2 in the Science stream with a minimum of 45% marks. But, Bachelor's degree courses,M.Sc., MBA, and Ph.D. programs need entrance papers like ICAR-AIEEA, CAT, & GATE. Every programme has different requirements for the courses. The application process may vary depending on the program.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by Navsari Agricultural University for admission?
faqs.answer: Navsari Agricultural University is one of the renowned universities of Gujarat, India. The university offers various programs. To get the admission in the university for Under Graduate programme the university take the admission with ICAR AIEEA exam score for which rank should be around 800 and it also checks the eligibility with the percentage in 12th The percentage should be 50% in 10+2 for admissionBest regards

faqs.question: Does Navsari Agricultural University accept ICAR AIEEA score?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can get admission to Navsari Agricultural University with the ICAR AIEEA exam. The universities welcome students with this entrance exam test for some UG programs. Students also need to meet the minimum eligibility criteria. You need 45% marks in class 12, along with the ICAR AIEEA exam marks. Moreover, the final selection is based on the total scores of ICAR AIEEA score and class 12th scores. At the same time, performance in the counselling process also matters.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does Navsari Agricultural University accept for admission to M.Tech?
faqs.answer: Navsari Agricultural University has M.E/M.Tech programme In 4 courses  and the fee for M.Tech is around 20,000 per year.Coming to the process of admission you can get it through the ICAR AIEEA exam by clearing the cutoff rank of that particular course and there is an eligibility criterion which is the student must have 60 percent in his under graduation.

faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at Navsari Agricultural University?
faqs.answer: Navsari Agricultural University charges different amounts of fees based on the students’ category. Well, a particular UG course may cost differently than the other. UG Application Fees for General is Rs. 500, and for SC / ST, and OBC students is Rs. 250. The B.Sc. agriculture programme cost starts at INR 1.2 Lacs per year. Other programs like B.Tech. Food Technology or B.F.Sc. Fees for fisheries might be a little bit different.

faqs.question: What are the fees structures for M.Tech programmes at Navsari Agricultural University?
faqs.answer: The fee structure of Navsari Agriculture University for the M.Tech programme is Rs. 45,100. It is for the first-year fees. Except for the course fee, there are many other fees at the university, too. It includes things like mess fees, maintenance fees, annual charges, hostel fees, and many more. You can quickly learn all the information about it from the university. Students can easily download the brochure and get all the important details. This university is quite affordable for students to pursue a career in the agriculture industry. The Shiksha website is also a valuable platform for exploring fee information.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at Navsari Agricultural University?
faqs.answer: Navsari Agricultural University (NAU) offers 72 courses in the fields of Science, Arts (Fine / Visual / Performing), and Business and Management Studies, among other streams to the students. Fees for various courses may differ depending on the type and level of the program. The total tuition fee for MBA program is around INR 20,000 . The seat intake for the NAU MBA in Agri-Business Management course is around 37.

hostel_campus.college_name: Navsari Agricultural University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The university has about 12 hostel blocks. Every hostel block is provided with the caretaker, mess with piped gas line facility, dining hall with seating facilities, T.V.room, solar water heaters, water cooler with mineral water plant, washerman, canteen, internet facility ( only for pg boys and girls hostels ), newspaper, and other required facilities.

library.description: The Navsari Agricultural University has a well-stocked central library with 64933 books, 1887 gratis books, 539 e-books, 10727 bound volumes of periodicals, 1980 M.Sc./M.V.Sc./MBA/ICT Thesis, 436 Ph.D. Thesis, 5746 Reports, 510 CD/DVD, 4073 journals/ periodicals subscriptions. The library also has reprographic facilities, OPAC Service, E-library and Digital Library.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Table Tennis Court, Two Volleyball Court, Kho-Kho Court, Two Kabbadi Ground, Running Tracks of 400 meters

reviews.review_heading: Queen college of agriculture
reviews.review_text: The hostels are well-managed and have decent infrastructure. You will get a room that you likely share with at least one other person, and each room is available with a study table and a chair. The campus itself is fully Wi-Fi enabled, so that's a plus.

reviews.review_text: In our college, all department labs are there like the entomology lab, plant pathology lab, etc. In our college Wi-Fi facilities are very good and also in the hostel Wi-Fi is available. The library is very good having all types of books which help in the competitive exams and other general knowledge. Mess is attached to the hostel and food is good in the mess. Many sports ...

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: I have had the pleasure of residing in our college hostel for past three years and I must say it is been an incredible experience. Hostel infrastructure is modern and well-maintained, with clean and spacious rooms, comfortable beds, and ample storage space.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by College of Agriculture- Waghai, Navsari Agricultural UniversityReviewed on 20 Jan 2025)

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and also has labs and a playground. There is also a library where you can get all the agriculture-related books and some non-agriculture-related books. The college also has free Wi-Fi, and the hostel rooms are good, clean, and have CCTV cameras.

And hostel rooms are good and also have good quality beds and almira. Our college has one ground for sports and also a mess is available.

reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are awesome, including 24*7 water availability, food mess, Wi-Fi facility and huge library with larger sources of books. Food quality is the best in this campus among all other agricultural campus in Gujarat. Canteen is open 24 hours in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. Our college has good machines, and it has well-working equipment. The hostel facility is available for students. Our college provides the best hostel facilities for girls. The hostel rooms are spacious. Around 2 students can stay in each room. The hostel rooms have attached bathrooms. Washrooms are clean. The washroom is shared between 2 rooms, so 4 students share one washroom. We get a balcony.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2016Offered by College of Agricultural Engineering- Dediapada, Navsari Agricultural UniversityReviewed on 19 Dec 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Beauty with knowledgeable growth.
reviews.review_text: Government are focus on agricultural sector so government improve study of agricultural. Honestly our college facility is very good. All four department (food processing, renewable engineering, farm tractor and machinery, soil and water conservation) are 1 head of department and 2 assistant professor. Education level are very good. In library you given one card issue library. You take 4 books in one time and submit book within 10 days otherwise 10 rs fine each days late submission. All departmen...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by College of Agriculture- Waghai, Navsari Agricultural UniversityReviewed on 12 Nov 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent experience and the surrounding area.
reviews.review_text: Facilities that were provided in the hostel were very good. There were numerous labs, including the microbiology lab, the mushroom excellence center, and the plant breeding lab, all of which are fully equipped with cutting-edge technology. Classrooms and libraries were good. The food in the hostel was of average quality.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by College of Agriculture- Waghai, Navsari Agricultural UniversityReviewed on 6 Oct 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Our college has an excellent environment.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure and environment are excellent. All corners are facilitated with a Wi-Fi network, and classrooms are neat and clean. The college has a huge library with an active librarian. The quality of mess food is average. Our campus doesn't have any canteen facilities or medical facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by College of Agriculture- Waghai, Navsari Agricultural UniversityReviewed on 16 Sep 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Best faculty and an amazing campus environment.
reviews.review_text: Campus is huge and equipped with all the facilities. Wi-Fi is provided by NAU SSO with 35 Mbps speed in the entire campus. College has different subject labs. Mess food quality is average and canteen is not available. All sports equipment are there.

review_content.General: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce offers excellent infrastructure for B.Com students, including spacious classrooms with projectors, campus-wide Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Computer lab supports learning tools like tally and MS excel. Hostels are clean and well-maintained with shared rooms, regular housekeeping, and basic furniture. Mess provides hygienic, average-tasting food with multiple options. Canteens and cafes are also available on campus. Medical needs are handled by an on-call ambulance service and nearby Somaiya Hospital. Sports facilities include a large playground, basketball court, gym, and indoor games. Overall, campus provides a comfortable and resourceful learning environment.

The library is quiet and the best place for people who love to read books because they have thousands of books for everyone.

overview_faqs.question: What is KJ Somaiya College of Arts & Commerce famous for?
overview_faqs.answer: KJ Somaiya college of Arts and commerce is famous for his faculty, infrastructure, Academics, Placement and Sports. This college provides many opportunities for students. Laboratories, sports, library, computing facilities, etc., are some of the facilities provided by KJ Somaiya College of Arts & Commerce. As per the shiksha verified review, the college is rated 4.2/5 which is considered is decent rating.

overview_faqs.question: Is KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce a good college for BA?
overview_faqs.answer: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce has received positive reviews from the alumni and students in terms of placement, infrastructure and faculty. According to the verified Shiksha reviews for KJSAC received from the students, the highest salary offered to the batch of 2023 stood at INR 4 LPA and the lowest salary offered stood at INR 2 Lacs per annum. Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce has a good infrastructure. Students can also avail financial aids provided by the University. Hence, this can be considered a decent choice for students seeking BA admission.

overview_faqs.question: Is getting into KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce tough?
overview_faqs.answer: KJSAC admission is entirely merit based. Candidates who want to take admission to any of the undergraduate or postgraduate level programmes at KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce must achieve the minimum cutoff declared by the institute. According to the cutoff data for the year 2023, the last round percentage for General All India category candidates for BA and BCom programmes stood at 84% and 84.5% respectively. The cutoffs so declared may vary every year. KJSAC Cutoffs may even vary for candidates who belong to the reserved category.

review_summary.college_name: K J Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great fests, an amazing campus, and friendly teachers.

content.Placements: The college doesn’t provide any official placement opportunities yet, at least not that I or my peers have heard of. Some students get internships at small companies through the medium of the college, but not officially through the college, rather through connections made in college and so on. Overall, I would say that if placements are the main concern, then there are better colleges to look for. I am not saying this is the worst one, but not all placements are official.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is top-notch, with no complaints. The library is well-maintained. Classrooms are clean. Labs have all the required apparatus. The canteen food is very tasty. The canteen is very clean. Overall, infrastructure is very nice.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Well-rounded college life with good infrastructure and learning environment.

content.Placements: Around 40-50% of B.Com students get placed with average packages of 3 LPA to 3.5 LPA. Top recruiters include Deloitte, EY, and HDFC. About 60-70% of students secure internships in finance, audit, and banking sectors.
content.Infrastructure: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce offers excellent infrastructure for B.Com students, including spacious classrooms with projectors, campus-wide Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Computer lab supports learning tools like tally and MS excel. Hostels are clean and well-maintained with shared rooms, regular housekeeping, and basic furniture. Mess provides hygienic, average-tasting food with multiple options. Canteens and cafes are also available on campus. Medical needs are handled by an on-call ambulance service and nearby Somaiya Hospital. Sports facilities include a large playground, basketball court, gym, and indoor games. Overall, campus provides a comfortable and resourceful learning environment.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best college for the course!

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is above 80%; it differs as per the list. There are prescribed fees for different years. Companies like Land, JP Morgan, etc., have placement rates of about 70% to 80%, sometimes even 100%. I am a student and very happy with the university!
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the best, very peaceful, and clean. The facilities like the library, ladies' rooms, AC canteens, and many more are available. The best quality of food is provided, and there is a wide variety of food. The quality of facilities is the best.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The overall review is 5/5.

content.Placements: All students who were interested in placement and didn't want to study further got placements at very good packages. The companies that visit here for placement are also big organizations; for example, one of my friends is in KPMG, one is in PWC, one is in HDFC Bank, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has its own Wi-Fi, which is a 5G network. The canteens are very clean and hygienic, and the cost of the food is also affordable and tasty. The library is quiet and the best place for people who love to read books because they have thousands of books for everyone.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: An extract of the KJ Somaiya review.

content.Placements: The highest package offered is 6.5 LPA, and the average package is 2.5-3 LPA. I'm not sure about the percentage of students placed. The companies that offer placements are TCS, Reliance, HDFC, etc., including Wipro. Roughly 40% of students get placed for internships in the companies mentioned earlier, with stipends ranging from Rs. 5,000 to Rs. 15,000. Roles include Accountant, Business Development Intern, Finance Intern, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really good, especially for sports. They have a whole campus, and it’s a great opportunity for anyone who is into sports. They offer a variety of sports like chess, basketball, football, table tennis, and more. The infrastructure is great, with all the greenery, and there are lots of libraries with a variety of books. For the hostel, I would say it's above average, but it’s very expensive. It is available for all courses. All facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and others are there, but the hostel is kind expensive. The cafeteria is there, but they don't have a variety.

admission_process.title: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce admissions 2025are merit based for both the undergraduate and postgraduate programmes and entrance based for the PhD programme. Admission to all theSomaiya college of Arts and Commerce coursesis based on qualifying examination marks.Somaiya college of Arts and Commerce admission 2025for the PhD programme is through Somaiya Vidyavihar University PhD entrance test and Personal Interview.

Candidates who want take admission in any of the certificate, diploma, undergraduate, PG diploma, postgraduate or doctoral programme at KJSAC are required to apply on the official website of the college by furnishing all the necessary details required during the time of application process.KJ Somaiya college admission form2025has been released by the institute.

The college applications are now open for admission. KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce course admission is merit-based for undergraduate and postgraduate programmes. Additionally, the admission is entrance based for PhD programme. Find below the key highlights ofKJSAC admission 2025:

Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce admission 2025will entirely be merit based for UG and PG programmes while it will be entrance based followed by Personal Interview for PhD programme. Minimum eligibility for UG programme admission atKJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerceis Class 12 and Bachelor’s degree in the relevant stream for admission in PG programme. Given below is the list ofKJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commercecourses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

*Graduates of this University in faculties other than faculty of Arts, or candidates who have passed the equivalent examination of another University seeking admission in the MA programme atKJSAC Mumbaiby papers, will have to appear for an eligibility test.

Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce feesis different for the UG, PG and doctoral programmes. The total tuition fees charged by the college for undergraduate programmes for academic year 2023-2024 was INR 2,400 and for the postgraduate programme, it ranges between INR 2,000 and INR 47,975. Given below is the tabular representation of the programme wise fees breakup atKJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce:

Candidates who get their admission cancelled atKJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commercecan request for refund of fees after applying in writing for cancellation of their admission atSomaiya collegeof Arts and Commerce. Once the cancellation application is made, the institute will refund the percentage of fees to candidates after deducting some charges. The charges so deducted by the college will depend on the factor that when the application of cancellation of admission is made by candidates. Find below the detailed fees deduction policy atKJSAC Mumbai:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The college has different seat intake criteria for various programmes. The total seat intake for the UG programmes ranges from 360 to 1,080 and the total seat intake for PG programmes atKJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerceranges from 60 to 300. Given below is the tabular representation ofSomaiya college of Arts and Commerceseat intake for different courses:

Somaiya College of Arts and Commercehas a seat reservation policy which is followed both for the undergradaute and postgraduate programmes. The college has reserved 50% of the total seat intake for the Gujarati linguistics candidates and 3% seats for other government category candidates. The remaining 42% of the total seat intake here is reserved for open and all reserved category candidates. Mentioned below is the seat reservation policy atKJSAC Mumbai:

**Government Others category includes physically handicapped/ cultural and sports (National and State level winners)/ widow/ divorcee women/ wards of ex- servicemen/ transferred Government employees/ existing and former defense person).

KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce admission process 2025is a multi-step process. Admission in the undergraduate and postgraduate programmes are merit based and candidates who want to take admission in any of the programme offered byKJSACare required to follow certain steps. Mentioned below is theSomaiya College of Arts and Commerce admission process 2025:
STEP 1: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce Application Process 2025

Candidates are first required to visit the official website ofSomaiya College of Arts and Commerce: kjsac.somaiya.edu.in and fill out online Pre-admission form* along with the payment of non-refundable and non-transferable application fees.
STEP 2: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce Selection Criteria 2025
A merit list is then released as per the schedule on the website as prescribed by theUniversity of Mumbai.

STEP 3:Candidates shortlisted as per the merit list can then collect the blank admission form by providing pre-admission form cash payment receipt. As a part of this step, they must also fill the form and attach all necessary documents.
STEP 4: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce Counselling and Seat Allotment

All the document submitted by candidates are verified byKJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerceand an ID number will be generated on the college counter and the final step of theKJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce Admission process 2025will be the payment of fees through online mode.Check KJSAC Cutoffs.
*It is mandatory to fill out the Pre-admission online enrolment form on the University website before applying for the course.

The cutoffs so declared may vary every year.KJSAC Cutoffsmay even vary for candidates who belong to the reserved category.

faqs.question: What is the cutoff for KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce?
faqs.answer: Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce admission 2025is merit based. After candidates successfully fill out the pre-admission form, a merit list is declared and the shortlisted candidates can submit all the necessary documents to confirm their admission. The last round percentage for the year 2023 for General All India category candidates atKJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commercefor the BCom programme stood at 84.5% and last round percentage for General All India category candidatesfor the BA programme admission was 84%. TheSomaiya College of Arts and Commerce Cutoffsmay vary for the candidates who belong to the reserved category.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce?
faqs.answer: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce admission 2025will be merit based. Admission to all the certificate, diploma, undergraduate, PG Diploma and postgraduate programmes is made on the basis of marks obtained by candidates in their respective qualifying examination.Somaiya College of Arts and CommercePhD admission is subject to candidates’ performance in Somaiya Vidyavihar University PhD Entrance Test (SVU-PET) followed by a Personal Interview.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance required to get into KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce?
faqs.answer: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce course admissionin all the undergraduate and postgraduate programmes is based on marks obtained by candidates in qualifying examinations. There is no rquirement to submit any entrance test score by candidates if they want to take admission in any of the programme offered by the college. However,KJSAC PhD admissionis entrance based. Candidates who want to take admission in the PhD programme offered at KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce must appear for Somaiya Vidyavihar University PhD Entrance Test (SVU-PET) followed by the Personal Interview.

reviews.review_heading: Great fests, an amazing campus, and friendly teachers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is top-notch, with no complaints. The library is well-maintained. Classrooms are clean. Labs have all the required apparatus. The canteen food is very tasty. The canteen is very clean. Overall, infrastructure is very nice.

reviews.review_heading: Well-rounded college life with good infrastructure and learning environment.
reviews.review_text: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce offers excellent infrastructure for B.Com students, including spacious classrooms with projectors, campus-wide Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Computer lab supports learning tools like tally and MS excel. Hostels are clean and well-maintained with shared rooms, regular housekeeping, and basic furniture. Mess provides hygienic, average-tasting food with multiple options. Canteens and cafes are also available on campus. Medical needs are handled by an on-...

reviews.review_heading: Best college for the course!
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best, very peaceful, and clean. The facilities like the library, ladies' rooms, AC canteens, and many more are available. The best quality of food is provided, and there is a wide variety of food. The quality of facilities is the best.

reviews.review_heading: The overall review is 5/5.
reviews.review_text: Our college has its own Wi-Fi, which is a 5G network. The canteens are very clean and hygienic, and the cost of the food is also affordable and tasty. The library is quiet and the best place for people who love to read books because they have thousands of books for everyone.

reviews.review_heading: An extract of the KJ Somaiya review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good, especially for sports. They have a whole campus, and it’s a great opportunity for anyone who is into sports. They offer a variety of sports like chess, basketball, football, table tennis, and more. The infrastructure is great, with all the greenery, and there are lots of libraries with a variety of books. For the hostel, I would say it's above average, but it’s very expensive. It is available for all courses. All facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and others are ther...

reviews.review_heading: Excellent Academics, Good Placements, and Great Infrastructure!
reviews.review_text: K J Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce boasts excellent infrastructure, including a well-stocked library, modern labs, spacious classrooms, and an auditorium. Hostel facilities offer comfortable accommodation and hygienic food. Medical facilities, a sports complex, a gym, and campus-wide Wi-Fi connectivity cater to students' overall development.

reviews.review_heading: More Placement opportunities should be Given, satisfied with the Faculty .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is somewhat old-fashioned, and the facilities are basic. Sometimes classrooms are not clean, and they haven't provided the Wi-Fi password. The library is average, but the books are helpful before exams, especially with the book bank scheme. The computer lab is good, and the teachers are helpful.

reviews.review_heading: Somaiya: One stop solution for all your business studies.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available. Classrooms are good to go. The hostel is very well-defined and good in infrastructure. There is also a Xerox center available in the college building itself, which provides great support for all your documentation. Overall, a good experience, though it can be much better.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing College but disappointed with the office staff because they are the most irritating.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is fabulous; there are lots and lots of facilities available. The campus is huge, and the canteen is so huge with so many options to choose from. The quality of food is also so good, and sports and games are also nicely managed and played there.

reviews.review_heading: KJSAC: worth the social life.
reviews.review_text:
I can not say much about hostel as I am not living there but as for classes, I think the infrastructure is good and satisfactory. 
Somaiya has the biggest campus with various different colleges in it, each specializing in their own. 
There are 6-7 canteens on campus with good quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Actually it's a very good college with a good campus and good canteen with good infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: It's a very good college in the first place. The facilities provided by the college is so good and the teaching staff are also good and specially the campus is so huge. I like the library facility so much because whenever you sit in a girls reading room, you feel so much at peace.

reviews.review_heading: This provides a short glimpse of K. J. Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce.
reviews.review_text: In my college, there were a total of 32 institutes where the infrastructure was no less than that of a society. The food and infrastructure were excellent. The course had many professors who graduated from prestigious universities, including abroad. Overall, it was an amazing experience.

reviews.review_heading: Somaiya has one of the biggest campuses in Mumbai, and it is a good experience going to the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is more than average. You will get almost all the facilities in the college like good classrooms and Wi-Fi for students. There is a library with separate sections for boys and girls that are open all day. The canteen facilities are excellent and serve numerous varieties of food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in terms of education and sports.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our library is good and well-set up. Free Wi-Fi is available on campus. Our classrooms are good and comfortable. Sports facilities are good. Coaches are available in our college to help and train us. The hostel is good and has a huge mess facility. The food served in the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus, good canteens and nice facilities.
reviews.review_text: We have a very good and large campus with good food, play area, and good infrastructure. We have labs, a library, IT rooms and much more which are very good. We have an athletic ground, badminton court, basketball court, and many more facilities each has good infrastructure.

reviews_list.review_title: The college Infrastructure is excellent.

review_content.Placements: If you are taking about the placements, there is no as such placements in this college. The campus is good and with a good infrastructure. overview_faqs.question: Is Dr. M.C. Saxena Group of Colleges (MCSGOC) a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Dr. M.C. Saxena Group of Colleges (MCSGOC) is a well-known institution for B.Tech, D.Pharma, B.Pharma, MBA/PGDM, After 1th Diploma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Dr. M.C. Saxena Group of Colleges (MCSGOC) has a rating of 3 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3 on campuslife, 2.4 on placements, 2.9 on faculty and 3.8 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. M.C. Saxena Group of Colleges (MCSGOC) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Not good place to shape your career.

content.Placements: Last year no student has been placed from our college Till date, the highest salary is approximately. 50k to 70k and the lowest salary is 15k to 30k Amazon, HCl, etc. Companies are the top recruiting companies Software trainee, developer or tester, dba, etc. are some of the roles that are offered in our course. the highest package is around 12-13 lac per annum, the average package is around 3.5-5 lac per annum and the lowest package is 1-2 ka per annum. As there is no placement so there is no internship as well.
content.Infrastructure: As of now, our hostel is moreover like PG there is no proper sanitation, as well as management in our hostel. Many of the student are busy in drinking alcohol as well as taking weed. There is no warden in our hostel. No CCTV camera, no Wi-Fi, the condition of washrooms is pathetic, no security of the student stuffs, condition of sports and games is not good. And the quality of food is very bad. Overall condition of our hostel is very bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am fully dissatisfied with our college.

content.Placements: There are no campus placements in our college as not single a company visit our college for placements. Placements are nil in every branch. Our college doesn't show any interest in campusing, and no one even thinks about placements. I will never suggest anyone to take admission in this college.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities which are provided here include a library with an old collection of books. So, the library strictly needs to be updated. There is no Wi-Fi facility. However, the only thing which is good here is the infrastructure of our college, which is high. Buildings are internally well designed and attractive. There are no medical facilities, and the hostel is not well maintained. There are dirty washrooms, and the hostel is fully unhygienic. The food served in the hostel is very bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The college Infrastructure is excellent.

content.Placements: If you are taking about the placements, there is no as such placements in this college. The campus is good and with a good infrastructure. You don't get any internships from the college. The highest package is around 4-5 lac and minimum is 2 lac offered to our course. But only 20% students get placed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is build really good though it is in the outskirts of the city. the college have a good hostel facility and good mess and canteen. There is a big playground for sports facility too. Overall it has a good library, ground and classrooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with faculty, placement and poor labs. I suggest not to take admission.

content.Placements: Placements are nil in 2019. Our seniors batch also had nil placements. In 2015 last placement was recorded. Non of the company visited the college. No HR is available in the college and company don't show interest to visit our college.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is the worst. All classrooms have centralised air-conditioners, but it doesn't work, and tables, benches are broken. They are very dirty and full of dust. Roads of campus are rough, and glasses of buildings are broken, and the colour of buildings get blurred. Most of the buildings are in the condition of falling.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the placements in 2014.

content.Placements: The placement scenario of college is very poor. Only a few students get placed from our college. Very less number of technical companies visit the college for placement drives. If you are thinking to take admission in this college, then don't expect any placement opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very poor. Wi-Fi facilities are not available in the college. Classrooms are very old. There are no medical facilities and no exposure to sports. I suggest you do not ever think to take admission in this college and do not recommend this college to anyone.

reviews.review_heading: Not good place to shape your career.
reviews.review_text: As of now, our hostel is moreover like PG there is no proper sanitation, as well as management in our hostel. Many of the student are busy in drinking alcohol as well as taking weed. There is no warden in our hostel. No CCTV camera, no Wi-Fi, the condition of washrooms is pathetic, no security of the student stuffs, condition of sports and games is not good. And the quality of food is very bad. Overall condition of our hostel is very bad.

reviews.review_heading: I am fully dissatisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities which are provided here include a library with an old collection of books. So, the library strictly needs to be updated. There is no Wi-Fi facility. However, the only thing which is good here is the infrastructure of our college, which is high. Buildings are internally well designed and attractive. There are no medical facilities, and the hostel is not well maintained. There are dirty washrooms, and the hostel is fully unhygienic. The food served in the hostel is very bad.

reviews.review_heading: The college Infrastructure is excellent.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of the college is build really good though it is in the outskirts of the city. 
the college have a good hostel facility and good mess and canteen. There is a big playground for sports facility too. Overall it has a good library, ground and classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with faculty, placement and poor labs. I suggest not to take admission.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is the worst. All classrooms have centralised air-conditioners, but it doesn't work, and tables, benches are broken. They are very dirty and full of dust. Roads of campus are rough, and glasses of buildings are broken, and the colour of buildings get blurred. Most of the buildings are in the condition of falling.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the placements in 2014.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very poor. Wi-Fi facilities are not available in the college. Classrooms are very old. There are no medical facilities and no exposure to sports. I suggest you do not ever think to take admission in this college and do not recommend this college to anyone.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of the college is good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is situated in a lush green area and is spread over 30 acres. There are 2-3 grounds for outdoor games. There is a central library for the students. The campus consists of around ten buildings including the hostels and laboratories. The laboratories are fully equipped.

reviews.review_heading: College infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good and the building looks beautiful. Our college has an outstanding look and a great structure. To provide the best view the college management is working in different ways and overall it is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: A good college where you can enjoy your college life and studies. Helpful faculty. Bad placements.
reviews.review_text: There is a good infrastructure in this college. Wi-Fi is available on the college campus, and also a hostel facility is present here. In all the classrooms, AC is available. Lab qualities are very good, but a few faculty members are not perfect in their subject like how to explain anything to the students. Also, medical facilities are available here. Sports and games are held in this college along with a better canteen than the other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, but it has poor management. It is top 5 colleges of Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure and good labs. Every lab works fine, large ground for sports, every college inside the campus is connected with paved road and a large parking space for bikes and cars. The place is green and clean, and the seats in civil are just like a primary school. In second years of my studies, they ran out of chalk, because they weren't able to afford.

reviews.review_heading: My college facilities are good, but many problems are faced due to college management.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available in the campus. The quality of lab is good, but the classroom quality is not good. The cheapest quality of food is available in the canteen. The hostel room is clean and clear, more space in the room and all facilities are available in a hostel room. I face many infrastructure related issues during my tenure at the college like light and water facilities, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in north India.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also very good. The buildings are very high, and the campus is very attractive by external part. There is a fountain in the middle of the buildings, and also, there is a very attractive infrastructure which shows the useful utilisation of manpower.

reviews.review_heading: I've admired by my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great near about 30-acres of campus around. The library build around in a completely different block so we can have great peace of learning. Our college has a building for pharmacy, chemistry labs and bio-laboratory. There is some sort of a cultivation lab where hybridising is done for many years, even though there are getting successful output. The red building is the heart of our campus where greatest mind creates history by knowing their extraordinary talents and skills,...

reviews.review_heading: Dr. M.C. Saxena Group of Colleges is good for engineering.
reviews.review_text: There are so many facilities in my college. Our classrooms are fully air-conditioned and marble-floored. The experimental labs are in very good quality such as there is every machine available for experiments. Our library is also air-conditioned and there is very silent to read in. In our college, sports and games were held at the time of the annual function named "DISHA".

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfactory experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very average. The college was located in the village side area surrounded by fields on all the side. There were problems faced while commuting to and fro and during the rainy season, the conditions were even worse. So overall, I had a bad experience.

reviews.review_heading: Downfall of this college since they made the experienced teachers go out.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good and the building is very good looking. The classrooms are well furnished. You might get ac in your first year but after that, you'll only see it but won't get to have its air. The labs are good but you will never get a chance to go to computer labs as almost all the times they are conducting online exams there to earn money.

reviews_list.review_title: Course is best. But college can be advised only if they resolve the internet issues.

review_content.Placements: There are 50 students placed in every batch. The package of the course starts from minimum 12.5 lakhs and goes to 15 lakhs. The student can get in any hospital having vacancy and eligibility or can even do self practice in the clinic. Internship done in hospital of college itself, but it doesn't have much patients. The important drawback is the internal issue that the college have due to which students of last 2 years are facing quite an issue.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, there are labs, library present which could be made better. The hostel was not proper initially but now it has improved. The canteen has been started since last year and the quality of that food is average and eatable.

admission_process.title: Hillside Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Hillside Group of Institutions admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingMedicine and Health Sciences and Business and Management Studies.Hillside Group of Institutionsadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asNEET, KCET, and Karnataka 2nd PUC. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 96,000 - 2,72,250for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 66 months - 4 years.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It does not have a good infrastructure but is the best place for earning skills.

review_content.Placements: The pass percentage of the students is above 75%. And placement offers by the companies are above 69%. Divis Labs and Reddy Labs offer the best placements to students in different positions. The internship is based on the type of company required.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are provided with the best projectors for a detailed version of the explanation. Library which consists of numerous books and journals. Coming to food quality it is okay, wherever we go, we have to face the same problem all over India.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: We are glad about our college.

review_content.Placements: This college has a vast placement cell, and approximately 80% of students get placed. The top companies conduct the placement drive at this college. The college has separate faculty for the placement cell. It is excellent and outstanding.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are outstanding and provide a wide range of chemicals for experimentation. There is a digital library, a computer lab, and projectors in every class to help students understand concepts easily. There is also a sick room for medical facilities. It is outstanding, good, and excellent.

review_summary.college_name: Sir C.R.Reddy College of Pharmaceutical Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Explorable journey in Eluru.

content.Placements: Above 85% of students are placed in our course. The highest package of our college is 12 LPA, and the lowest package of our college is 6 LPA. Avenida recruitment companies offered jobs and placements to our college. Students got 90% in internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our labs are very useful to us. They provide good knowledge for every student. Our scientific garden is very clean and peaceful. In each classroom, CC camera is there. It has full Wi-Fi. Library gives extra knowledge to every student in their subjects and clarifies their doubts.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is like a beautiful book, which is very explorable.

content.Placements: Almost 50-70% of students get placed in companies like Divi's, etc. The highest package is 4.5 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. Roles offered in my course include data analyst, clinical pharmacist, duty doctor, medical coding, etc. Sun Pharma and Divi's offer many roles in my college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has Wi-Fi in the pharmacy lab, the principal's cabin, and also in the library. Labs are neat and clean with updated equipment and samples. The food available in the hostel is above average. The badminton court and the volleyball court are provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Explorable journey in Eluru.
reviews.review_text: Our labs are very useful to us. They provide good knowledge for every student. Our scientific garden is very clean and peaceful. In each classroom, CC camera is there. It has full Wi-Fi. Library gives extra knowledge to every student in their subjects and clarifies their doubts.

reviews.review_heading: It is like a beautiful book, which is very explorable.
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi in the pharmacy lab, the principal's cabin, and also in the library. Labs are neat and clean with updated equipment and samples. The food available in the hostel is above average. The badminton court and the volleyball court are provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: It does not have a good infrastructure but is the best place for earning skills.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are provided with the best projectors for a detailed version of the explanation. Library which consists of numerous books and journals. Coming to food quality it is okay, wherever we go, we have to face the same problem all over India.

reviews.review_heading: We are glad about our college.
reviews.review_text: Labs are outstanding and provide a wide range of chemicals for experimentation. There is a digital library, a computer lab, and projectors in every class to help students understand concepts easily. There is also a sick room for medical facilities. It is outstanding, good, and excellent.

reviews.review_heading: We are very glad to our college.
reviews.review_text: Labs are outstanding. They provide vast chemicals for experimentation. There are digital library, computer lab, and projectors for every classrooms to understand the concept easily for a student. There is a sick room for medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I think we should be lucky to join this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and course are excellent. The hostel is now only available for girls. Boys hostel are available out of the college but in the same institute. We have digital classrooms, a library, a digital library, and good labs with equipment for pharmacy practice.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty and good placements every year.
reviews.review_text: Excellent faculty with excellent teaching, digital classes are available, labs are available, and classrooms are provided with projectors, benches with chalkboards, and labs are provided with efficient equipment. An auditorium is provided for fests and other programs.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good faculty, good environment and very enjoyable period along with the studies.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are awesome, and the faculty are very good and comfortable. We have Pharma Week every year in December, and during the whole month of December, we enjoyed a lot with games. The only thing is we don't have a canteen in my college when I was studying. Also, we have a small ground, which was a little bit disappointing, but apart from that, all the facilities like classrooms, labs, nature, all are very well and nice.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for education and placements.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good, and all the classrooms are well-facilitated. All the classrooms are good, and the best faculty are present. Every small event is celebrated, including National Pharmacy Week, with games conducted for the whole week.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure, facilities, and placements.
reviews.review_text: Laboratories are well-equipped. Classrooms are well-maintained. There is a decent library and several books are available. The food quality is average. Girls' hostel is available on our campus. Medical facilities are also available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: The drawback about our college is that it does not encourage sports.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good here. Our college has a huge range of internet bandwidth, and the classrooms are clean and neat. There is a huge digital library and a normal library so that students can study in the library. The atmosphere is good in the library, and the labs are maintained very clean.

reviews.review_heading: An honest review of Sir C.R.Reddy College of Pharmaceutical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: High maintenance charges are taken from the students. Washrooms are not good. Quality of the facilities is not good. The hostel management is not good, and they can't do anything for students. The management leaves them alone so that the students are free.

reviews.review_heading:
Absolutely dissatisfied with the faculty in the last academic year
.
reviews.review_text:
We have good facilities provided and we have a good infrastructure for our course we are provided with good Wi-Fi we have good laboratory facilities classrooms are bigger and we have a good library. 
We have a good hostel with quality food and good medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: A beautiful diary of our college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library are available in our college, but there is no proper guidance. Classrooms are not very large; they are small. The food is very bad in our college canteen. Sports and games are the best thing in our college that are conducted every week.

reviews.review_heading: No doubt about it, was feeling so happy to study in this college.
reviews.review_text: Labs are very good here, classrooms also, and we have a big library and hostels are also available for all. When compared to other hostels, it was too good for us. Wi-Fi is also available in some labs but we have all the equipment required for our experiments.

reviews_list.review_title: My personal view on Darshan Dental College.

review_content.Placements: A total of about 100 students are admitted each year. Internships last around 300 days. There is no placement provided for intern students. We have to find jobs on our own. Almost 80% of students who complete UG are doing internships at this college only. MS is offered in all the departments.
review_content.Infrastructure: A playground, library, gym, indoor games, mess, canteen, and hostel for both boys and girls are available. There is an anti-ragging committee made up of staff members. The food served in the mess is also good. A variety of food is given. Indoor games like table tennis, carrom, and badminton are present.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Darshan dental college and hospital.

review_content.Placements: Talking about dentistry, there is not much of placements. Yes, BDS/MS doctors do get placed in hospitals or clinics but for their personal growth and experience almost everyone choose to set up their own clinic. But the college definitely trains us efficiently through years of study and practice to get placed in any dental care institution.
review_content.Infrastructure: Library, Gymnasium, playground, mess, canteen, hostel ( total of 4) all the facilities are available and all the needs of students and inmates are taken care of. The hostel rooms are big and spacious with good furniture and cleanliness. Food in the mess is satisfactory and the meal is rotated on weekly basis.

review_summary.college_name: Darshan Dental College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Darshan Dental College and Hospital.

content.Placements: Placements are decent for a dental college. Clinical exposure matters more than corporate placements here. Internships and house-surgeonship opportunities are available in the attached hospital, which provides good patient flow and hands-on experience. Most students either prepare for MS entrance exams, join clinics, or start their own practice instead of regular campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is clean and spacious, with separate academic blocks and hospital buildings. The OPD is good, with adequate patient inflow, which really helps in clinical learning. Labs are well equipped for pre-clinical work like conservative dentistry, prosthodontics, and the anatomy dissection hall. The library has good seating space and enough textbooks, with access to internet facilities. Hostel facilities are decent, with mess food being average but manageable. Overall, the infrastructure is satisfactory for a dental college.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for the best memories.

content.Placements: There are 75 students in my batch and out of it, 66 students got placed and continuing their internship at the college premises only. Roles offered are as an undergraduate or postgraduate and we can join as a staff member also. Students can even continue their post-graduation in college only with such a flow of patients.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. We have a library in the college. Volleyball ground, cricket ground, and many more facilities are available in our college. There is a hostel, mess, and canteen with good infrastructure. Rooms are also big and hygienic with 24-hour electricity and water supplies. The canteen is also good, hygienic with a good taste.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My personal view on Darshan Dental College.

content.Placements: A total of about 100 students are admitted each year. Internships last around 300 days. There is no placement provided for intern students. We have to find jobs on our own. Almost 80% of students who complete UG are doing internships at this college only. MS is offered in all the departments.
content.Infrastructure: A playground, library, gym, indoor games, mess, canteen, and hostel for both boys and girls are available. There is an anti-ragging committee made up of staff members. The food served in the mess is also good. A variety of food is given. Indoor games like table tennis, carrom, and badminton are present.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Darshan dental college and hospital.

content.Placements: Talking about dentistry, there is not much of placements. Yes, BDS/MS doctors do get placed in hospitals or clinics but for their personal growth and experience almost everyone choose to set up their own clinic. But the college definitely trains us efficiently through years of study and practice to get placed in any dental care institution.
content.Infrastructure: Library, Gymnasium, playground, mess, canteen, hostel ( total of 4) all the facilities are available and all the needs of students and inmates are taken care of. The hostel rooms are big and spacious with good furniture and cleanliness. Food in the mess is satisfactory and the meal is rotated on weekly basis.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Darshan Dental College and Hospital.

content.Placements: An internship is for 6 months after completion of under graduation degree. The stipend offered is less for the internship students as compared to other colleges. Placements are not provided to the internship students after completing their 6 months of internship.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is situated inside the college campus itself. Separate hostels are available for both boys and girls. According to the college, there is no ragging policy, and there is also an anti-ragging committee by PG students and staff members. The ragging is somewhat promoted. Sometimes the food served in a mess is good, but it is the worst in taste on other days. Varieties of food are given weekly, and there is also a special meal on Sunday. Registration for the hostel is done at the starting of the academic year, and it provides a room for two students.

individual_reviews.title: My college is good in Madhya Pradesh.

content.Placements: I took admission to SV Polytechnic College, Bhopal in 2019 and completed my diploma in 2022. In my college, a company named IBM selected 13 students. Many students from our college got 6 LPA packages.
content.Infrastructure: Our college was run by the government. It did not have many facilities but books were available for free.
content.Faculty: Our college sir and madam were very helpful at good times. They used to help students and pay attention to everything properly. They used to call students by names and whenever we reached them if we did not have anything, they usually get it from their own money.

individual_reviews.title: Good placement college in India.

content.Placements: Which students are regular in college and don’t have any backlogs, and their CGPA is 6, can get placed in top companies. The highest package in my course is 6 LPA, and the average package is 2.4 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Tata Motors, Mahindra, Maruti Suzuki, John Deere, Ford, L&T, Owens Corning, and others. Students with a percentage greater than 60% also got internships for free in CRIPS, as it is a government college.

paragraphs: S.V. Polytechnic College admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in streams includingEngineering, Medicine and Health Sciences and IT and Software.S.V. Polytechnic Collegeadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asCBSE 10th, CBSE 12th, and MPBSE 10th. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 20,000for UG, PG and After 10th level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 2 years - 3 years.

faqs.answer:
A:    Patna Institute of Nursing and Paramedical Science has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityANMCandidate's minimum age must be 17 years and maximum age must be 35 years as on 31-Dec-2023.B.Sc. (Post Basic)Candidates should be registered as Registered Nurses and Registered Midwives (RNRM).
Candidates should possess a three-year Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery (GNM).
Candidates should have a minimum of two years of experience in the profession (after registration as RNRM).B.H.A.Candidate must have passed 10+2 from a recognised board.B.Sc.Candidate must have passed 10+2 examination with Science stream from a recognised board.GNMCandidate's minimum age must be 17 years and maximum age must be 35 years as on 31-Dec-2023.BPTCandidate must have passed 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology as their main subjects and obtained minimum mentioned marks from a recognised board.UG DiplomaCandidate must have completed 10+2 from any recognised Board/Council.

college_info.intro:
DPG Polytechnic offers a vast range of diploma courses in various disciplines. Of particular popularity are the Engineering courses offered by the institute. Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering are well sought-after courses at DPG Polytechnic. Candidates interested in the Medical fields may opt for the Medical Lab Technician (DMLT) course that equips them to serve in the crucial role of Lab Technicians in some of the leading hospitals and Medical franchises.
More information regarding the popular courses at DPG Polytechnic can be found below:

faqs.answer: A:    The Chairman of the DPG Group is Mr. Rajender Gahlot, who is in charge of the administration of the different academic and career departments at the various DPG institutions. The institute has put in place many members of the senior faculty as in-charge of different departments at DPG Polytechnic. These various branches at the institute include the Academic Cell, NCC Cell, Training & Placement Cell, and many others. The Principal at DPG Polytechnic is Mr. Vinod.
faqs.question: Who are the top leaders at DPG Polytechnic?

faqs.answer: A:    The placements at DPG Polytechnic is a vibrant and happening time at the campus. With over 3,000 placements conducted every year by over 250 companies, the institute invests deeply into the career-building of its students. DPG Polytechnic offers 100% placement support, and organizes a variety of skill and personality-building to develop the overall character of a DPG graduate. Companies from all fields of the corporate world, from engineering to consulting make rounds to upgrade their work

review_content.Placements: In my batch, approximately 95% of students who have completed their Diploma within 3 years got placed. The highest package offered was 30,000 per month. The top recruiters are DLF, L&T, Emaar, Alpro Industries etc. 90% of students get internships. Our college provides good facilities like hostel, good canteen etc. The college has good transportation facilities.
review_content.Infrastructure: DPG College has good campus facilities. It has good air-conditioned classrooms and library. Washrooms and bathrooms are neat and clean. The hostel mess food is good. The rooms have good beds, mineral and fresh water facilities. It has a big cricket ground, basketball and tennis courts.

reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college for a diploma in Gurgaon.

review_content.Placements: Many technical and non-technical companies come to our college campus for recruitment. The company that visit for automobiles is Toyota, and for IT, companies that visit here are Wipro and many other MNCs. Our college seriously thinks about students placements. If you are an expert in your skills, you may get a job.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good. Canteens and many other facilities are available like separate hostels for boys and girls. The bus service covers a very large area, and the college building is good. Classrooms have proper benches, and some classrooms have air-conditioners.
