overview_faqs.question: How costly is DPG Polytechnic?
overview_faqs.answer: DPG Polytechnic offers a wide range of career-ready Diploma programs to bright students at fair and reasonable prices. The fees structure at the institute is differentiated on the basis of semesters. Students in the 1st, 3rd, and 5th semesters will be required to pay INR 25,000. Whereas, the fees for the 2nd, 4th, and 6th semesters is INR 20,000.Moreover, the candidates opting for additional facilities and conveniences like hostel accommodation would have to bear the expenses of the same. The hostel fees for non-air-conditioned and air-conditioned rooms at DPG Polytechnic are INR 6,500 and INR 8,000 respectively.

overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

overview_faqs.question: What are the colleges affiliated with DPG Polytechnic?
overview_faqs.answer: The DPG Group has gained much acclaim for establishing a network of quality institutions to provide training and capacity-building in different fields. Apart from DPG Polytechnic, the DPG Degree College provides mainstream higher education to the students in the city of Gurgaon. The courses offered at DPG Degree College include popular programs like BA, BCom, among others. Also part of the DPG network of institutions is the fast-growing DPG Center for Occupational and Industry-Linked Learning (DCOIL).

individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure is good but.

content.Placements: My placement story has been one *** of a roller coaster ride. There have been so many ups and down throughout this journey but by god's grace I came out victorious. This roller coaster ride started in the 3rd Year. So straight into the first month of 3rd year, companies started to come for internships. I was an average student with a very average pointer of 7.96. This is where the journey of getting rejected started.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure really matters while joining an engineering college for Polytechnic. I did Polytechnic from DPG and my friends completed B.Tech in CSE from DPG itself. DPG has very good labs facilities for all the engineering programmes offered. DPG is also best in terms of quality education and placements. DPG offers engineering in various programmes such as CSE, CE, Chemical, ECE, EEE/EE, ME, Automobile, Aerospace.

content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are knowledgeable and they teach us very well. They are student-friendly and their behavior is good. The teaching method is simple and easy to understand.

individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for diploma courses.

content.Placements: Almost 10% of the computer science engineering diploma students got campus placements. The salary offered was ranged from Rs. 7,000-18,000 per month in companies like Wipro. STEP 1: DPG Polytechnic Application Process 2025
DPG Polytechnic application process is carried out in online mode. Eligible candidates are required to visit the official website to register and fill out the application form.

courses_data.name: DPG Polytechnic After 10th Diploma
courses_data.description: DPG Polytechnic provides After 10th Diploma courses in various engineering specialisations with direct admission. Students must pass Class 10 from a recognised board to be eligible. The selection is based purely on merit and no entrance exam is required.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for After 10th Diploma at DPG Polytechnic?
faqs.answer: For admission to the After 10th Diploma at DPG Polytechnic, students should have passed Class 10 from a board recognised by the government. No entrance test is required, and admissions are directly made on the basis of merit. The college provides different engineering Diploma specialisations. Candidates can apply online through the official website.

faqs.question: Can I take admission to DPG Polytechnic with 55% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is still possible to apply to DPG Polytechnic with 55% in class 12 provided that one is passing in class 10.Class 12 marks are not a requirement as the minimum is Class 10.Admission is direct and on the basis of your 10 th result.Ensure that you complete the application form.

faqs.question: How to apply to DPG Polytechnic?
faqs.answer: Candidates wishing to enroll into any of the illustrious Diploma programs at DPG Polytechnic must first familiarize themselves with the eligibility criteria for their desired course.  The course can be looked up by the student and they can learn of any additional criteria. Candidates must visit the official website and head to the Admissions Portal of DPG Polytechnic.The applicants must make a note of all the documentation required to fulfil the joining formalities at DPG Polytechnic. After obtaining the online application form, the student can enter the required personal and academic details and wait for the screening/shortlisting process to conclude. Post that the applicants can expect to receive an admission offer letter from DPG Polytechnic.

reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good in this college. Wi-Fi is available on campus. Hostel facilities are very well but the food quality is better. Meals are provided three times per day and tea is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Review of DPG Polytechnic.
reviews.review_text: DPG College has good campus facilities. It has good air-conditioned classrooms and library. Washrooms and bathrooms are neat and clean. The hostel mess food is good. The rooms have good beds, mineral and fresh water facilities. It has a big cricket ground, basketball and tennis courts.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college for a diploma in Gurgaon.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good. Canteens and many other facilities are available like separate hostels for boys and girls. The bus service covers a very large area, and the college building is good. Classrooms have proper benches, and some classrooms have air-conditioners.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for diploma courses.
reviews.review_text: DPGITM has different building for diploma, i.e., named DPG Polytechnic. It's a nice college with free high-speed Wi-Fi and a friendly environment. The campus is ragging-free. All were friendly here.  The campus is spacious, and staff members are also helpful. Labs were well organised and clean. The college never lacked resources. Sports activities were also there.

reviews.review_heading: Best private Diploma college.
reviews.review_text: The best facilities are provided by the DPG Polytechnic college. The facilities like Wi-Fi, Library, Medical Facilities, Sports and Games etc. Are provided by the DPG Polytechnic College. The quality of labs and classrooms are also good. The quality of the food is also good that are available in the canteen. The infrastructure of the DPG Polytechnic college is also good.

reviews.review_heading: My first experience in the university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good from the outside but has to be maintained from the inside as the washrooms are not kept properly. The infrastructure can be perfected in a better way, and the college mess and canteen can also be perfected, if they use proper food items and good diet chart.

reviews.review_heading: Not fully satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in the campus are neither good nor bad. Wi-Fi is available here but does not work well. The classrooms here are okay with a good library, but the medical facility is bad here as they don't have a medical room or something like that. They don't have proper working instruments in the labs. The food quality is average here which not so good and not so bad.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for diploma. You can get more practical knowledge from here.
reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure. Also, they have different labs for each subject, and even they provide library facility to the students as well as teachers so that they can take books from there. And, they also provide book bank facility. And workshop is also available to practice.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: We are getting good infrastructure for study, but the problem is network connectivity is very low. Good classroom conditions, and best library I've seen. The campus is small but good. It has a cricket playground which is medium in size. It has 2 canteen in campus and 1 nescafe.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement and faculty member
reviews.review_text:
Hostel is good but the students are not so good and Worden keeps checking the hostel.
Mess food of the hostel is not eateable at all .
All rooms and laboratories are well equipped and wifi enabled, except of the teaching rooms to prevent students from using phones during lecture.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the college campus it values money and the education provided.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very spacious and it is well ventilated. All the classes and the labs are well maintained and fully furnished. After entering the infrastructure the students will not wish to go out of it.  the canteen is just awesome, its food is very tasty and neat and clean.

paragraphs: DPG Polytechnic offers a wide range of career-ready Diploma programs to bright students at fair and reasonable prices. The fees structure at the institute is differentiated on the basis of semesters. Students in the 1st,  3rd, and 5th semesters will be required to pay INR 25,000. Whereas, the fees for the 2nd,  4th, and 6th semesters is INR 20,000.

Moreover, the candidates opting for additional facilities and conveniences like hostel accommodation would have to bear the expenses of the same. The hostel fees for non-air-conditioned and air-conditioned rooms at DPG Polytechnic are INR 6,500 and INR 8,000 respectively.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Terrible college. No placements. Would not recommend it at all. Don't make the mistake I made.

review_content.Placements: Our college is not the best. It has poor placements and no patient flow yet it's rewarded with A++ by NAC. And I was really surprised how Nac can be fooled like this. Our college is private so it accepts donations too. The marks you need to get in this college are above 300. You need to do an internship in the college itself and it pays 1500-3000 monthly.
review_content.Infrastructure: The staff is so poor and their pay is so low compared to other colleges. The staff is rude, unmannered, toxic, and not supportive at all. They don't even know how to teach properly. The campus is so tiny. The canteen is terrible too. The hotel is dirty, small, and toxic. The food is terrible too. Our college doesn't prioritize sports, any events, or feats at all. We don't have anything else except academics and that too is terrible, you have to study everything from scratch on your own. The overall terrible choice I made and I regret it.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of teaching quality and patient shortage in the college.

review_content.Placements: Around 10% of students get placed in our course every year. The salary package offered is according to the caste quota system. Almost 100% of the students get internships by the college. The internship is done at the same college. There are 8 BDS and MS branches provided by the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are 2 smart rooms in the college which do not work all the time. There is always some technical problems present but manageable. We have a library with average resources for studying and research. Average mess and hostel facilities are provided. Wi-Fi is not available.

reviews_list.review_title: Great experience studying in rims

review_content.Placements: There is no such thing called placements in mbbs colleges, you will get to do a one year compulsory rotatory medical internship where you will get great exposure to different kinds of cases, you will get great clinical exposure and you can develop skills which can make you survive in your career moving forward.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is average, there is no canteen in college premises.Central Library is awesome with recently established digital library you can find books of all years. Sports facilities are good, there are tournaments every year for different sports, if you are interested in sports the tournaments would be awesome.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the best medical colleges in Karnataka.

review_content.Placements: Around 150 students got placed in our course. Our college provides good internship opportunities for students. Our college is good in terms of education.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a well-equipped hospital. Doctors are good. Medical facilities are available 24X7. Classrooms are spacious and good. They are equipped with air-conditioners. They serve chicken every night. The food served in the mess is good.
review_content.Faculty: All teachers are good. They have completed their degrees. The teaching quality is good. They are friendly but at the same time, they maintain discipline. They take hours of a seminar to build self-confidence in your life. Overall, our campus is very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Totally, our college is very good both academically and in cultural programmes.

review_content.Placements: All of them are placed in packages of about 6-7 LPA. Almost 100 percent of the students got an internship from our course medical officer in the PHC centre, which is offered by our course. The highest package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. There is a digital library present, which has more books and also computer labs have very good infrastructure and maintenance. Classrooms have sufficient seating capacity and have digital boards, which are helpful for learning purposes. The quality of food is nice in the hostel, and also in the canteen. There are various sports on campus, such as badminton, cricket, volleyball, throwball and basketball.

review_summary.college_name: Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the good faculty members, but it should provide ventilation.

content.Placements: About 150 students take admission every year. The salary is offered only to the people who conduct internships and teaching and other staff members. Since it is a medical course, companies don't visit. Internships will be provided in the same college hospital.
content.Infrastructure: There is no free Wi-Fi facility, but there are good labs, classrooms and a library. But proper ventilation is not available in classrooms. The quality of facilities provided in the hostel such as food, etc., is average. Since it is a medical college hostel, medical facilities are good. Sports and games are rarely provided.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Reality of Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences, Raichur.

content.Placements: Our college does not provide placement opportunities, it does provide compulsory rotating internships for 365 days in the district hospital of Raichur. The hospital sees a huge patient load of about 2500 patients per day for a batch of 150 students, which provides good practical experience. In addition, the teaching faculty is good, which helps students gain admission to postgraduate programs. The students are also provided with a monthly salary of INR 30,000.
content.Infrastructure: The college building is vast, and four stories high. It has four lecture halls, one big auditorium, and one mini auditorium. There is a large library where students can read or borrow books. There are different laboratories for different departments. The hostel building is five stories high and has 164 rooms and two study halls where students can study at night. The mess is affordable, and the average monthly bill is about 3200 rupees.

description: Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 22776 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences MBBS cutoff 2025 was 22776 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 23033 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 61029 to 157119. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Pathology, followed by MD in Bio-Chemistry. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 61029 and 157119, respectively.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

In this section, Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences Karnataka NEET UG cutoff 2025 is available, alongside the last round cutoff of 2024 and 2023 for the general category students. Admission to the MBBS courses is done based on the NEET UG exam ranks, followed by the Karnataka NEET UG counselling process to avail a seat at Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences. As per this year’s cutoff, the General Home State quota stands at a cutoff rank of 51114 for MBBS.

Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences cutoff 2024 for MD and MS courses revealed the growing demand of specialisation preferences among the candidates belonging to different categories. Considering the Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences MD cutoff 2024, the most popular specialisation for admission was MD in Pathology with a closing cutoff rank of 27777 for the General AI category candidates.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Raghavendra Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Pharma and D.Pharma. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.Pharma. Raghavendra Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Raghavendra Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research courses stands around INR 34,000 to 3,90,000.

faqs.answer: A:    The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Raghavendra Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research is approximately INR 34000 - INR 240000.

review_content.General: Department-wise labs and classrooms are maintained with all needed equipment possible, but Wi-Fi is not provided that well. Parts of hostels are providing better food, but mostly taste is manageable. It is good as low strength in hostels overall, and good accommodation is provided. The distance between the college and hostel is somewhat manageable with college buses provided, but it is hard to do with hot water and facilities. There is limited space for sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement and really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got jobs through campus placements. For B.Pharma, the highest salary was 3.4 lakhs per year. Natco, hetero, and divis were some of the companies that participated in the placement drive. For B.Pharma, internships are not required but are available for PG students. About 20 students went for internships in Hyderabad in quality assurance, quality control, production, AR&D, and clinical trials.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our College has modern classrooms equipped with projectors, well-equipped laboratories with modern instruments, and a library with a wide range of books and journals. Every year, the college conducts a sports week, and major events such as the IPC event have been held at the college. Articles and journals are published by the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for a better future.

review_content.Placements: Almost 60% of students got placed in different industries. The average salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting company is NATCO. Top roles offered are QA, AR&D, QC, etc. Many students got internships for one month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good. Laboratories are well-equipped. Our campus is very peaceful with lots of medicinal plants. The food served in the canteen is good. Mess is also available. Projector is available in our classroom. Computer facilities are also available in this college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: About Raghavendra Institute:

content.Placements: In our college, around 45 percent of people are placed, and coming to the highest package of 20 lacs is high according to the previous year, and the AVG package is 4 LPA. Top companies will not come to our college, medium college people will come, and most of the people will get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is okay, not that great, and faculty are friendly in nature. Wi-Fi is not so good all the time, and most of the time it won't work. The library is there, transport is not so good, food availability is there, and we need to pay for that, and medical facilities are there, which is very good.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review details on RIPER College.

content.Placements: In our college placements, they can only be rated at 45–50%; approximately, packages were not very high, on average, 15–20k per month, because many expect to have higher degrees. Opportunities are there, but not that great. Just as we can know the path, providing a lot of internships at their best, the highest was around 4.5 L per annum for courses on pharmaceutical analytics, practice pharmacy, pharma. D., M.Pharma, B.Pharma, industrial pharmacy. These are offered by HETERO, and there are some companies.
content.Infrastructure: Department-wise labs and classrooms are maintained with all needed equipment possible, but Wi-Fi is not provided that well. Parts of hostels are providing better food, but mostly taste is manageable. It is good as low strength in hostels overall, and good accommodation is provided. The distance between the college and hostel is somewhat manageable with college buses provided, but it is hard to do with hot water and facilities. There is limited space for sports and games.

admission_process.title: Raghavendra Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Raghavendra Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Raghavendra Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research considers scores in AP EAMCET, AP PGECET, and BIEAP for admission to specific courses.Raghavendra Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Researchoffers courses at the UG, PG and Doctorate levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 2 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 34,000 - 3,20,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,76,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

Raghavendra Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Pharmacy' category. Following the provided parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the university is ranked in a good position when compared to other universities by the NIRF 2024. In 2024, Raghavendra Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research fell 9 ranks to #101 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. reviews.review_heading: Raghavendhra institute of pharmaceutical education and research .
reviews.review_text: Our college has provided us with good classrooms, playgrounds, laboratories, a library, canteens, parking places, Wi-Fi areas, auditoriums, seminar halls, and study halls. reviews.review_text: According to the course, this college is good, more than requirement they are providing. The teaching staff is not that experienced. The hostel is average, and the maintenance is not good. There is no filtered water and no hot water in this college.

reviews.review_heading: This college has good practical skills, and curricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of campus is student friendly and the institute teach us man.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good because it provides practical knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are classrooms, a library, laboratory, animal house, etc. The hostel facility is available with rooms and attached washrooms and canteen. The quality in our hostel is good, and the rice is collected from the nandyala brand from Kurnool.

reviews.review_heading: Placements available are good.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Ch. Devi Lal Group of Institutes is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and Teaching & Education. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.Pharma, B.A.M.S. and B.Ed. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Ch. Devi Lal Group of Institutes programmes is around INR 73,500 to 2,16,400.

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Ch. Devi Lal Group of Institutes are approved by eminent Government bodies like NCTE, CCIM, PCI. The combined seats available for courses offered at Ch. Devi Lal Group of Institutes goes up to 280.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good for BAMS.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of students got placement. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA, the average salary package offered is around 4 to 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3.50 LPA. College offers most placements in Himalaya Dabur and Patanjali. Around 100% of students get an internship in civil hospitals. The top role offered is AMO.
review_content.Infrastructure: Departments are well-equipped and infrastructure is moderate. Wi-Fi is available throughout campus. Library is also well maintained. Hostel is average in infrastructure and food quality. Medical facilities are impressive. There is a well-maintained sports complex.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college, but I'm sometimes dissatisfied with faculty members.

review_content.Placements: There are not many placements and internships. The salary package offered ranges from 1.2 LPA to 1.4 LPA. Dabur, Himalaya, Sun Pharma, and Dr. Reddy are the top recruiters. The percentage of students who got placements is below average in our course. If you are interested in building your own career, you should be attentive in classes and score good marks for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi facility. The library is average; all the books are from 2007 or 2008. The labs are average. The hostel is expensive. The mess and the canteen are not good. There are not many facilities for sports and games. Bus services, a good environment, a park, a herbal park, a volleyball ground, and parking are provided by the college.

Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. faqs.answer: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? Or are you more drawn to scientific exploration and research? Additional options:· M.Ed.: If you already have a B.Ed., you can pursue a Master of Education for career advancement or specialisation in a particular teaching area.· Diploma courses: Various specialised Diploma courses in education or related fields can enhance your skills and knowledge.

content.Placements: Our seniors got placed in our college in hospitals with an average salary of Rs.30,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The library has fewer books. The library is equipped with air-conditioners. The library is on the third floor. It gets hot in summer so any human can stay inside the hall. The hall is small.
content.Faculty: Our college provides professors for every subject. They are talented. They have MD degrees. Exams curriculum is according to ICSM. The exams are conducted under Shri Krishna AYUSH University Kurukshetra. Exams are held for every batch. Exams are conducted once a year.

UG programs include B.A. LL.B., B.Pharma and BBA.

faqs.answer: A:    Delhi Institute of Rural Development, Holambi Khurd offers courses such as BBA, BBA LL.B., B.A. LL.B. in the stream of Business & Management Studies, Law.

faqs.question: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at Delhi Institute of Rural Development, Holambi Khurd?

review_content.General: The infrastructure of our college is good but not that good like Amity or any other private college. It consists of a single building. Wi-Fi facility is only accessible to staff members. Classrooms are clean and good with proper space. The library is also good, and you can find every book there. I did not hear about the college hostel or anything. If you are an outsider, then you can take PG room. The quality of the food served is excellent. Medical facilities are available. Sports events are also conducted, but it is organised by the main campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely Satisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2019, really good infrastructure etc.

review_content.Placements: 1. 60 percent of students are placed in Law firms in 2019. 2. The highest Salary Offered = Rs. 25000. the lowest Salary Offered = RS. 15000. Average salary Offered = RS. 20000. 3. Top Recruiting Companies are = Luthra & Luthra, Khaitan & Company, Vanish Associates, Jindal Associated etc. 4. Top Roles Offered = Legal Assistant, Assistant Public Prosecutor, Notary, Legal Writer, Legal Management Trainee etc. 5. The highest salary package offered = Rs 300000. the lowest Salary package offered = Rs 240000. Average salary package offered = RS 180000. 6. 80 Percent of students got Internship in Delhi District courts and Delhi High court.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2019

review_summary.college_name: Delhi Institute of Rural Development, Holambi Khurd Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Not a good college campus.

content.Placements: Placements depend on your hard work and personal development which you get in the 5 years of the course. About 65% of marks are required to attend placements. Wipro, Khaitan & Co and many other companies visit here for placements. Many students are appointed as a legal adviser in MNCs.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not good at all there is just one building, even smaller then a primary school. And there is no canteen facilities, there is moot court but not in use. There is no hostel facility and college is soo far like at the end borber of Delhi. And there is bus facility but you have to pay for that extra.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the education provided by the college.

content.Placements: There are a total of 69 students in our college who pursue a B.A. LL.B course. The highest salary package offered ranges from 5-10 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges from 1-2.5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered ranges from Rs. 50,000 to 1 lac per annum. You can join a firm or work on your own, or you can also work as a legal advisory for many companies. Almost 80% of students from our course get an internship. I heard that one of my seniors was appointed in the Indian Navy.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good but not that good like Amity or any other private college. It consists of a single building. Wi-Fi facility is only accessible to staff members. Classrooms are clean and good with proper space. The library is also good, and you can find every book there. I did not hear about the college hostel or anything. If you are an outsider, then you can take PG room. The quality of the food served is excellent. Medical facilities are available. Sports events are also conducted, but it is organised by the main campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely Satisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2019, really good infrastructure etc.

content.Placements: 1. 60 percent of students are placed in Law firms in 2019. 2. The highest Salary Offered = Rs. 25000. the lowest Salary Offered = RS. 15000. Average salary Offered = RS. 20000. 3. Top Recruiting Companies are = Luthra & Luthra, Khaitan & Company, Vanish Associates, Jindal Associated etc. 4. Top Roles Offered = Legal Assistant, Assistant Public Prosecutor, Notary, Legal Writer, Legal Management Trainee etc. 5. The highest salary package offered = Rs 300000. the lowest Salary package offered = Rs 240000. Average salary package offered = RS 180000. 6. 80 Percent of students got Internship in Delhi District courts and Delhi High court.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Good facilities with great environment.

content.Placements: Most of the students choose litigation. So, income fluctuates. Most of the students starts internships in second year only so that they can learn the process of court quickly. And after becoming lawyer they can start earning quickly. College helps you in finding internships. They give time for internships in summer vacations.
content.Infrastructure: There is seminar hall in the campus. Almost all major sports activities are available. Canteen is located on the entrance GATE. Parking is also available. Hostle is no there for the college studends. Medical facilities is available 24/7. Transport facilities are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons) - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Average Law school with many perks if you can find.

content.Placements: No placement as such as it is a law school the students have to make it their self. Hardly few companies come here but you will get better one in open placement or while doing internships. In my batch we guys usually get while doing internship but college is supportive in these matters.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average they have good library and Wi-Fi facility plus they have good AC system. They have a common hall and have pool table and small bored games. Halls are quite good with other facilities. I enjoyed being there.

reviews.review_text:
1. Wi-Fi = Wi-Fi is available for both students and faculty members. Labs = Labs are not required in our Course 
Classrooms = Classrooms are Medium size having well-equipped Air conditioning system. Library = Library are good having many law relating books and judiciary Exam books 
2. Hostel = Hostel is not available but P. G is available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities with great environment.
reviews.review_text: There is seminar hall in the campus. Almost all major sports activities are available. Canteen is located on the entrance GATE. Parking is also available. Hostle is no there for the college studends. Medical facilities is available 24/7. Transport facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Average Law school with many perks if you can find.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average they have good library and Wi-Fi facility plus they have good AC system. They have a common hall and have pool table and small bored games. Halls are quite good with other facilities. I enjoyed being there.

reviews.review_heading: The college is considerable if one wants to go only to study and not for any other factor.
reviews.review_text: I am pursuing the law course, and we do not require labs. Therefore, labs are not there in our college as this college only provides law courses. Considering classrooms, they are not up to the mark as what one would expect from law classrooms. Classrooms are equipped with A/C but are not very well furnished, and they are not very good. The library is good, and one can get almost any book related to their course. Therefore, one can spend their time in the library. Since this is not a huge college...

reviews.review_heading: The best law college in Delhi with a decent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have a moot courtroom for our law students with all the legal material and internet services. The seminar can cater to all the basic needs of students. The canteen provides delicious food to the students. The library provides study material of all the fields.

reviews.review_heading: DIRD is not a worthy college to study B.A LLB course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. The campus has a building and parking area. The library is average. The college is situated in a village, so there are very few facilities like cafes in nearby areas. Facilities provided in the college are average.

reviews.review_heading: DIRD has turned out to be one of the best law colleges in India.
reviews.review_text: Delhi Institute of Rural Development, also known as DIRD college came into existence in 2002 under the imperatives of Mr Rafi Lal. Today, the college established itself as a self-financing institute in the field of allied health sciences management law and computer science.

reviews.review_heading: College is good. The faculty is also good. You will learn well, but the infrastructure is not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was not so good. Wi-Fi was there, and AC classrooms were present, but the parking space was bad, and the location was also very isolated. The canteen was also not so good. We had to travel far to eat something because we got nothing decent in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Delhi Institute of Rural Development.
reviews.review_text: The library and classrooms were pretty big and air-conditioned, but no Wi-Fi facility was provided. The infrastructure was not well developed, and reaching this college was difficult if you used public transport. There were no hostel facilities provided. The medical and sports facilities were also not available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Delhi Institute of Rural Development, Holambi Khurd.
reviews.review_text: Our college got gold medals 5 times in inter-college of IPU. The library has a peaceful atmosphere, and the infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a learning hub, and I am absolutely satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: The college has beautiful infrastructure and facilities like talented faculty members, fully furnished canteen, game zone, playground, and bus services to commute from one place to another. Every year, a sports day is organised, and that is the best part. IP fest is also organised. Seniors are helpful. The library is well-stocked.

reviews.review_heading: The campus might not be that good, but the teachers and the ambience are the best.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very elite, and the campus is centrally air-conditioned. The library is the most interesting place to be. Wi-Fi is provided on the campus. A medical practitioner is always available on the campus for any emergency. I am a sports player, and good sports facilities are available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of the canteen, placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi, but the library facilities are good. Medical facilities and sports facilities are good for students, and every Friday, there is a guest lecture. There is campus life. Classrooms are very small, and there is no air-conditioner. The infrastructure of our college is not worth it, and the crowd is not good. The canteen food is not good.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Mizoram University offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral degree programmes across various disciplines of Sciences, Arts and Commerce. It also offers a range of online courses. The duration of all the courses varies. Most of the UG courses are of three-year duration, whereas PG courses are of two years each. BTech and BPharma are of four-year duration and BArch is a five-year course.

Students have to pay the course admission fee to confirm their seat. The fee components are one-time chargeable, or have to be paid annually/semesterly. Mizoram University BSc tuition fee ranges between INR 10,200 and INR 38,100. This fee amount is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: Mizoram University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: My review about this college.

content.Placements: We have a separate department for placement and job opportunity which is known as CDC (Career Development Cell). They are working hard for our placement day and night. Internships are provided by my college; some are paid, some are unpaid, it depends on company to company. My internship experience was awesome, I earned and learned a lot. However, the average package was very less compared to market standards, around 2.5 LPA, and the highest was 14 LPA. The companies which come every year are Vodafone, ITC, Colgate, HDFC, Tata, Flipkart, Finance Bank, Bajaj Allianz, etc. They hire 75 percent of students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Optometry (B.Optom) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Faculty are helpful in everything. Hostel is excellent.

content.Placements: The percentage is almost 70 percent. Everything is under 50000. Everyone used to get a chance of internship after completing B. Pharma, B.Sc. nursing, B.Sc. mlt, B.Sc. optometry, and B.Sc. rit. They included a B.Sc. in physiotherapy and dialysis.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good at in affordable price. Library is also there. Every book is available there. Wi-Fi used to be available in 3hostels. Practical used to be there 2times a day, food is available in the hostel. In a week there are 3 days nonveg. There is a canteen available at in affordable price.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The best college in North East India.

content.Placements: The college created career guidance, counseling, and placement. The placement is not very good compared to top colleges in India. However, there once was a placement drive held on the campus. The program was organized in collaboration with ICICI Prudential and Life Insurance Company Limited.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel life is perfect, with two students sharing a room and free Wi-Fi access. Several shops are located just outside the campus. The hostel also offers a gym, as well as courts for football, volleyball, basketball, and futsal, all of which are free for residents to use. The hostel mess provides decent meals.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Perfect place to turn better into the greatest.

content.Placements: About 20% of the students from the B.Tech degree pursue Electrical Engineering. There are many packages offered, but mostly the elective subjects were taught by the professors for our broad studies. Most likely, there are no recruiting companies, as we all aim for government jobs. We completed our internship at the local 132kV substation. There are higher-ranking opportunities, but as we know, we need to start as Junior Engineers.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, library, Wi-Fi, and everything else are extraordinary. However, the lab machines are outdated. The equipment is old and cannot meet today's standards. The hostels are good, but the food needs improvement. The medical facilities are also good, but sometimes they can be hard to access.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: RIPANS - A memory to be remembered!

content.Placements: It is a central institute where admissions and hostel feel were very cheap. I finished my 4 years of B.Sc. Nursing with less than 2 lacs. The institution has well-learned and skilled teachers who guide us and provide us with knowledge. We were given enough freedom to express our opinions and we were encouraged to take part in various activities.
content.Infrastructure: Our hostel has Wi-Fi in every block. The hostel mess was 1200. The mess was not that good, the taste was not good according to our taste buds but with 1200 per month it is not a bad bargain. The infrastructure of the college is very good with spacious classrooms, well-maintained labs, and the library has updated books.

admission_overview.college_name: Mizoram University Course Admissions 2025: CUET, Applications (Open), Eligibility, Process, Fees & Dates

admission_process.title: Mizoram University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Mizoram University admissions 2025are primarily entrance-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exams such asCUET-UG,JEE Main,CUET-PG, etc. for admission to specific courses. Mizoram University also conductsentrance examsfor admission to various UG and PG programmes.The university offers more than 50 undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma programmes in Engineering, Management, Humanities, Medical, Life Sciences, and Architecture, etc. at campus and through affiliated colleges. Apart from the regular degree courses,Mizoram Universityalso extends Massive Open Online Courses (MOOCs) and online bachelor’s and master’s degrees, certificates, diplomas, and executive programmes.

Mizoram University offers a variety of UG and PG programmes in campus and through affiliated colleges. Candidates can apply online for any of the offered programmes. Out of all the courses, MBA, B.Ed and BPharm are the popular ones. Find below the key highlights related toMizoram University admissions:
Particulars
Mizoram University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
https://mzu.edu.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
Mizoram University Prospectus

Admission to all Mizoram University courses (UG, PG, integrated, diploma and others) is entrance-based. Eligible candidates can register online by visiting the official website of the university. The basic eligibility to apply for UG courses is Class 12 whereas graduation is required for PG programmes. The university also conducts its own entrance exam for admission to some of the UG and PG courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria for popularMizoram University courses:
Bachelor's degree and/ or a master's degree in Science, Social Science, or Humanities with at least 50% aggregate
Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology with specialisation in Science andMathematicswith at least 55% aggregate

Mizoram University fee is a sum of multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. Some of the fee components are charged one-time, while some have to be paid semester-wise or annually, such as tuition fees. The fee amount further varies depending upon the chosen course or specialisation. The following table mentions theMizoram University feebreakup for the top courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Candidates get a fee refund in case of cancellation or withdrawal of admission. Below is the detailed criteria:

Mizoram University seat intake varies course-wise. Candidates can get a seat in UG or PG programme of the university based on their performance in the national or university-level entrance exams. Check below the Mizoram University seat intake for top courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Mizoram University also reserves some percentage of seats for reserved category candidates. For Engineering courses, 50% of seats are for MZUEE and the other 50% for JEE (CSAB).

For PG courses, 10% of seats are reserved for EWS over and above the existing seats. Besides, 70% of seats are for MZU online admission for Planning and Architecture and the other 30% from JoSAA/ CSAB.
Below is the reservation policy at MZU:

Mizoram University admissions begin with the registration process. Candidates must first check their eligibility and apply accordingly for the programme. Below is the step-wiseMizoram University admission process:
STEP 1: Mizoram University Application Process 2025

Aspirants meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online. Aspirants applying throughCUET-UGorCUET-PGmust fill out the application form of the respective exams. Besides, aspirants also need to apply on the universit's website for a few courses. Once registration is done, candidates can move on to the other selection rounds.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Mizoram University selects candidates for most of the UG and PG programmes based on the MZU Entrance Exam conducted by the university. Besides, it also accepts national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main,GATE, etc. for admission to specific courses. For some of the courses, aspirants might also need to come for the personal interview round.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

After completion of the selection rounds, MZU releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected candidates. Shortlisted aspirants need to pay the programme fee to confirm their seat in the university.
For more information about Mizoram University check out the below videos:

cutoff_tables: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering
courses_data.description: Mizoram University offers a four-year BTech course spread across eight semesters. The university offers BTech inElectronics and Communication,Information Technology,Computer Engineering,Electricaland Civil Engineering. Admission to the BTech programme is based on JEE Main or MZUEE scores.  For BTech programme university also conducts the entrance exams. Students who have completed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for the BTech programme.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in Mizoram University in B.Tech if my rank is between 2,35,000 and 2,40,000?
faqs.answer: For last year, the closing rank for BTech in Electrical Engineering was 338365. This was for general category under All India quota. Unless the candidate belongs to some other category or domicile, one cannot afford to score less than this. With this rank, there is a probability of getting admission however since, the cut offs keep changing year on year, it is advisable to try to score better ranks to increase your chances of getting admission in Mizoram University.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at Mizoram University?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed Class 12 examination or its equivalent from any recognised board with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for Mizoram University BTech programme. Those appearing in the Class 12 final or equivalent exam may also appear for MZUEEE provisionally.

faqs.question: What is the JEE Mains cut off for B.Tech. in Civil Engineering in Mizoram University?
faqs.answer: For 2024, cut off was 655364 for General category candidates in All India quota for BTech in Civil Engineering in Mizoram University. BTech cut off varies depending on the category and domicile/quota of the applicant. Cutoff is the minimum score required for getting admission to a course.

courses_data.description: Mizoram University offers a full-time two-year course of MBA (Regular). The university offers this course across four specialisations through the Department of Management. Apart from that, the university also offers MBA in Tourism and Hospitality Management. AtMizoram University, both of the courses are taught through the School of Economics, Management & Information Sciences.Admission to MBA (Regular) is entrance-based. Candidates who have completed graduation with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for MBA programme.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to MBA at Mizoram University?
faqs.answer: Mizoram University admission to MBA (Regular) is entrance-based. Aspirants need to qualify CUET-PG or MSU entrance exam with a valid score, followed by a Group Discussion (GD) and Personal Interview (PI) round. For admission to MBA (T&HM), the department concerned of Mizoram University conducts an entrance exam and the final selection is done based on the performance of candidates in the GD/PI rounds.In case some seats remain unfilled, then the university conducts an entrance exam to fill those

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at Mizoram University?
faqs.answer: In order to get admission to MBA at Mizoram University, students need to graduate with minimum 50% aggregate. Candidates belonging to reserved categories are required to get 45% aggregate. Candidates must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at later stages of admission. Besides, aspirants need to qualifyCUET-PGor MZU Entrance Exam to get admission in Mizoram University MBA programme.

faqs.question: Which MBA specialisations does Mizoram University offer?
faqs.answer: Mizoram University offers two year MBA General and MBA Tourism and Hospitality Management. At the PG level, Mizoram University accepts admission to MBA course through a valid score in the respective national-level entrance exams. Students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in order to get admission. Candidates need to pass graduation with at least 50% aggregate in the respective subjects (45% aggregate for reserved categories) to apply for MBA programme.

courses_data.name: Mizoram University MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Mizoram University offers a full-time two-year course of MBA (Regular). The university offers this course across four specialisations through the Department of Management. Apart from that, the university also offers MBA in Tourism and Hospitality Management. AtMizoram University, both of the courses are taught through the School of Economics, Management & Information Sciences.Admission to MBA (Regular) is entrance-based. Candidates who have completed graduation with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for MBA programme.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to MBA at Mizoram University?
faqs.answer: Mizoram University admission to MBA (Regular) is entrance-based. Aspirants need to qualify CUET-PG or MSU entrance exam with a valid score, followed by a Group Discussion (GD) and Personal Interview (PI) round. For admission to MBA (T&HM), the department concerned of Mizoram University conducts an entrance exam and the final selection is done based on the performance of candidates in the GD/PI rounds.In case some seats remain unfilled, then the university conducts an entrance exam to fill those

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at Mizoram University?
faqs.answer: In order to get admission to MBA at Mizoram University, students need to graduate with minimum 50% aggregate. Candidates belonging to reserved categories are required to get 45% aggregate. Candidates must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at later stages of admission. Besides, aspirants need to qualifyCUET-PGor MZU Entrance Exam to get admission in Mizoram University MBA programme.

faqs.question: Which MBA specialisations does Mizoram University offer?
faqs.answer: Mizoram University offers two year MBA General and MBA Tourism and Hospitality Management. At the PG level, Mizoram University accepts admission to MBA course through a valid score in the respective national-level entrance exams. Students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in order to get admission. Candidates need to pass graduation with at least 50% aggregate in the respective subjects (45% aggregate for reserved categories) to apply for MBA programme.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at Mizoram University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for MBA at Mizoram University ranges betweenINR 50,700 and INR 56,800. In addition there are other components included in total fee such as hostel fee security deposit etc. This fee is taken from official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to change. Hence is indicative.

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply at Mizoram University?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to fulfil the eligibility requirement for the course they are applying for. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas graduation is required for PG programmes. Find below course-wise Mizoram University eligibility criteria:Course NameCommon EligibilityB.EdBachelor's degree and/ or a master's degree in Science, Social Science, or Humanities with at least 50% aggregateBachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology with specialisation in Science and Physics, at least 55% aggregateMBAGraduate with 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)BTechClass 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)MScBachelor's degree in relevant subjectMAUG degree

faqs.question: Is Mizoram University under CUET?
faqs.answer: Yes, from the year 2022 onwards, Mizoram University has made it mandatory for students to qualify CUET entrance exam for admission to UG courses. By qualifying CUET, students will able to get admission in the courses offered at campus or in affiliated colleges of Mizoram University. Below are some of the courses offered based on CUET score:BABComBBABSC

faqs.question: What is the cutoff for Mizoram University?
faqs.answer: Mizoram University releases cutoff based on JEE Main ranks of the candidates for BTech programme. The cutoff for most of the BTech specialisation shows afluctuatingtrend. The cutoff is not very high for BTech admission, candidates with decent rank can easily take admission in BTech programme. Below is JEE Main cutoff for Mizoram University BTech:BTech Specialisations202220232024Information Technology160773195933296633Electronics and Communication Engineering197775320005475809Electrical Engineering238091338365790555Computer Engineering146688194055234418

faqs.question: Does Mizoram University conduct an entrance test?
faqs.answer: Yes, Mizoram University conducts an entrance test (MZUEEE/ MZU-MTEE) for admission to Engineering courses. Further for admission to MBA (T&HM), the department concerned of Mizoram University for Management course conducts an entrance exam for the selection of eligible candidates. Besides, the university also conducts eligibility test for other UG and PG programmes of Mizoram University.

faqs.question: Is internship part of B.Ed curriculum at Mizoram University?
faqs.answer: Yes, in the third semester of the B.Ed programme, students need to do an internship. The whole of third semester comprising of 16 weeks will be devoted to internship related activities. The said internship will consist of three Phases: Pre-internship, Internship and Post-internship. During internship student teachers interact with the teachers, students, administrators and community including parents and try to understand the problems of schools and students which helps in their development as a teacher.

faqs.question: How much is the Mizoram University BSc tuition fee?
faqs.answer: The Mizoram University fee structure include multiple components, such as caution deposit, tuition fee, and more. Students have to pay the course admission fee to confirm their seat. The fee components are one-time chargeable, or have to be paid annually/semesterly. Mizoram University BSc tuition fee ranges between INR 10,200 and INR 38,100 . This fee amount is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the fees for B.Ed in Mizoram University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Mizoram University B.Ed is INR 28,400 . This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. The total fee of Mizoram University includes caution deposit and hostel charges. Candidates need to pay programme fee after completion of the selection round to confirm their seat in the university.

description: Mizoram University cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the Mizoram University JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

Mizoram University JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the Mizoram University CSE cutoff 2025 was 226687 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branch, such as ECE, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission was 331600, for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the Mizoram University B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 226687 and 642613 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 226687 and 284174, B.Tech. in Computer Engineering and B.Tech. in Information Technology were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at Mizoram University. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at Mizoram University to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of Mizoram University. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

The table below comprises PG course-specific merit lists, with the names of the candidates, application ID, & category of the candidates that have been shortlisted for admission counselling. Find below all rounds of merit lists of Mizoram University:

Candidates seeking admission to the DAVV MBBS course must have a valid score in NEET to be eligible for a further round of admissions. Going as per the previous year's DAVV cutoff, there has been a drastic change in the range of cutoffs. highlights.description: One of India’s top schools is Mizoram University. Numerous national ranking agencies have continuously recognised it as one of the best institutes. According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #82 rank in the University category. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around Mizoram University rankings.

rankings.highlight: Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Mizoram In 2025

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, Mizoram University has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is observable that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, Mizoram University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Mizoram University fell 5 ranks to #82 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less

outlook.description:
Mizoram University has earned commendable rankings across different domains in the Outlook 2025. This signifies the institution's esteemed reputation and proficiency in various aspects, assigning it an overall good score. Mizoram University's rankings in 'Central Universities' category have exhibited stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, Mizoram University's rank is #13, the same as last year's rank in the 'Central Universities' category by the Outlook ranking.

Mizoram University has been ranked well by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Through the years, the QS World University Rankingss for Mizoram University indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the QS World University Rankings.

All the hostels have basic amenities like water purifiers, common room, recreation room, mess, TV, laundry services, security and surveillance system etc.

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Course curriculum is in perfect balance between theoretical and practical learning. Special attention is given on personality and communication development. There are many research initiatives taken by institute curriculum according to the latest and very renowned syllabus, as they try to give students every possible teaching they can give related to MBA so that students feel that they are not only teaching old and outdated syllabus. Very convenient and clean hostels are provided to the students...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Regional Institute of Paramedical and Nursing SciencesReviewed on 11 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty are helpful in everything. Hostel is excellent.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good at in affordable price. Library is also there. Every book is available there. Wi-Fi used to be available in 3hostels. Practical used to be there 2times a day, food is available in the hostel. In a week there are 3 days nonveg. There is a canteen available at in affordable price.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Pachhunga University CollegeReviewed on 16 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The best college in North East India.
reviews.review_text: Hostel life is perfect, with two students sharing a room and free Wi-Fi access. Several shops are located just outside the campus. The hostel also offers a gym, as well as courts for football, volleyball, basketball, and futsal, all of which are free for residents to use. The hostel mess provides decent meals.

reviews.review_heading: Perfect place to turn better into the greatest.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, library, Wi-Fi, and everything else are extraordinary. However, the lab machines are outdated. The equipment is old and cannot meet today's standards. The hostels are good, but the food needs improvement. The medical facilities are also good, but sometimes they can be hard to access.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Regional Institute of Paramedical and Nursing SciencesReviewed on 23 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: RIPANS - A memory to be remembered!
reviews.review_text: Our hostel has Wi-Fi in every block. The hostel mess was 1200. The mess was not that good, the taste was not good according to our taste buds but with 1200 per month it is not a bad bargain. The infrastructure of the college is very good with spacious classrooms, well-maintained labs, and the library has updated books.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Government Saiha CollegeReviewed on 10 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Saiha College.
reviews.review_text: We are provided with insufficient classrooms with the implementation of the NEP system. Wi-Fi is not accessible only to faculty members. We don't have a working laboratory but the library is the best facility we can appreciate. There is a girl's hostel with very limited admission and no hostel for boys. There is an empty building supposed to be a boy's hostel but it is in the condition that it could collapse at any time. In terms of sports facilities, we have a basketball court as well as table ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Pachhunga University CollegeReviewed on 12 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The teaching quality is top here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not good at all but we still access it. We can easily connect it from the library but not from hostel, but still it works. The quality of the food is not good at all. I would not say it is worse. It is not that good with the mess fee being Rs. 2,700.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Pachhunga University CollegeReviewed on 20 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My PUC is very good in the studies and it holds 35th rank in NIRF.
reviews.review_text: The department room is very good in structure and I would say it is best. In the room, we have free Wi-Fi and the laboratory room is also very good in structure. The library is also good and it has around 5,000 books in the library. For the hostel, the meets fee is very good and very cheap than other PGs around the locality in the college. It has one sports complex which can be used to play football and other games. It has also one gymnasium.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Pachhunga University CollegeReviewed on 18 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My satisfying college days.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, and the college covers around 134 acres of land. Most of the classrooms are well-equipped with a projector. The hostel is moderate, but there is some water scarcity, you need to manage water wisely. The food is also average, I would say.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members of the education department were excellent.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is the most beautiful part. The infrastructure of the hostel and every department was so good. The university provides free access to the library and Wi-Fi. The quality of food in the mess was quite good. The university provides free access to medical facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Pachhunga University CollegeReviewed on 16 Jul 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Best college in Mizoram, maybe even North East.
reviews.review_text: As our campus is huge and renovations are being done,. The infrastructure and facilities are better compared to any other college in Mizoram. Every section has different buildings for each subject or stream and our classroom uses a projector for studying. It also has one of the biggest libraries. Hostels are also available for both boys and girls in different buildings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Government Kolasib CollegeReviewed on 20 Nov 2023)
reviews.review_heading: I can say that it is the best college in the state.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure were average compared to other colleges in Mizoram. But the lab is small and the apparatus is not up-to-date. On the other hand, classrooms were decent. They were comfortable and easy to enter. The lighting was good. We didn't have Wi-Fi or any other kind of network. The library was good, with more than 2000 books, but there were books we had to look up online for the syllabus. I didn't stay in a hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Pachhunga University CollegeReviewed on 24 Jun 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Pachhunga University College.
reviews.review_text: The library is open from 9:30 AM to 4:30 PM. Many books are available. The hostel is good. They select a hostel president who manages all the hostel things. The quality of the food in the canteen is delicious.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Government Hrangbana CollegeReviewed on 24 Jun 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Hrangbana College.
reviews.review_text: The library is well-equipped. Many books are available in the library. The quality of food in the canteen is good. There is a nurse who takes care of us when we are in the hospital. They are in the office thrice a week, so when we feel sick, we can ask for some painkillers.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied because of the connection between the students and the teachers.
reviews.review_text: There are 2 hostels only for B.Tech students. There are 10 hostels on campus. Free Wi-Fi is available in every hostel and every building in the department. Our classrooms are quite good. We have a canteen for B.Tech. The quality of food is fine. For sports activities, our college is average compared to other universities.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I'm dissatisfied because of the bad management.

review_content.Placements: Only about 10% of students in our college get placement in good ayurvedic companies; the rest have to find their own. There are not many recruiting companies that visit our college. Even though no internship money is being provided to the interns. We have reserved four seats for housestaffship but somehow those four seats of ours are not being given to us.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi in the class. The canteen is bad and unhygienic. The hostel facility started only this year. Labs are present but just for show. No actual lab work lessons are given to us. Apart from that, medical facilities are available because it's a medical college. There are no sports or games sections.

reviews_list.review_title: The environment is very good, and there are helpful faculty members and good quality education.

Food in the canteen is good, but it offers only vegetarian and non-vegetarian food options and no beverages. Girls' hostel facilities started this year, and there is no boys' hostel. Mess facilities are available.

review_summary.college_name: Rajib Gandhi Memorial Ayurvedic College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I'm dissatisfied because of the bad management.

content.Placements: Only about 10% of students in our college get placement in good ayurvedic companies; the rest have to find their own. There are not many recruiting companies that visit our college. Even though no internship money is being provided to the interns. We have reserved four seats for housestaffship but somehow those four seats of ours are not being given to us.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi in the class. The canteen is bad and unhygienic. The hostel facility started only this year. Labs are present but just for show. No actual lab work lessons are given to us. Apart from that, medical facilities are available because it's a medical college. There are no sports or games sections.
